form.formComment: Returns from a 49-day let-up. Last start ran last of 7 at this track on February 23 over 2000m, 14 len behind Sinnerman carrying 57kg at $3. The start before that 6th of 8 at this track on January 11 over 2000m, 11 len behind Objeto Final carrying 57kg at $2.20. Better than that recent lacklustre performance suggests.
